Page 01 — Account Takeover

The Reset & Regional Strategy

Diagnosing the inherited account from Mega AI and rebuilding the paid media foundation across all 10 locations — FL, GA, TN, NC, IL & TX.

1The Diagnosis

The Problem: Mega AI's Algorithmic Chokehold

The Setup

Spreading ad spend across 25 to 50 different creatives simultaneously under a single, shared budget across all 10 locations.

The Flaw

Total data dilution. By fracturing the budget across up to 50 ads, Meta never collected enough data on a single creative to exit the "Learning Phase." The algorithm was starved, performance stayed low, and ad dollars were effectively wasted.

One pool of money. Fifty hungry creatives. The algorithm never learned a thing.
2The Turnaround Plan

Phase 1 — Streamlining for Performance

Creative Consolidation

Shifting from 50 ads down to 5–10 highly impactful, data-dense creatives — concentrating spend so each one gathers enough signal to graduate the Learning Phase.

The Targeting Pivot

Moving away from rigid demographic targeting. Implementing location gating around the spas paired with Broad ICP targeting focused on feelings, emotional states, and self-care desires. Let Meta hunt for the right emotional triggers.

3Wave 1 Grouping Builder

Instead of all 10 stores fighting for one pool of money, we section locations into strategic geographic regions. Tap a model below to see how the footprint splits — we'll lock Wave 1 live in the meeting.

Approx. geographic layout · 10 locations
This isolates regional performance, shows which areas scale fastest, and systematically builds toward a dedicated budget for every single store.
Page 02 — Production

The Creative & Content Engine

Closing the on-site information gap and feeding the algorithm a deliberate, high-output creative matrix built around Emily's authority.

1Website Conversion Rate Optimization

The On-Site & Nurture Ecosystem

We are fixing the "information gap" on the current website to skyrocket close rates.

The Treatment Video Funnel

On the website "Treatments" page, users find short, engaging videos of Emily (the owner) explaining each treatment face-to-camera, spliced with high-quality B-roll of the service being performed.

The Trust Factor

Clients know exactly what to expect before stepping foot in the spa — stripping away buying friction at the point of decision.

The Nurture Sequence

These exact explainer videos are integrated into our automated email and SMS nurture sequences to convert cold leads who didn't book on their first visit.

2The 5-Part Paid Social Ad Matrix

Vote each format Yes or No live as we walk through it — approved formats feed Wave 1.

FormatDescriptionPurposeLive Vote
Green Screen UGCOur Favorite Emily's face pops up talking directly to camera, while high-quality treatment footage rolls smoothly in the background. Pattern Interrupt

Looks organic, builds instant trust — the owner is teaching.
POV StylePoint of View Raw, first-person footage: "Walk in with me to get my head spa treatment done." Experiential

Lets the viewer mentally place themselves inside the spa.
Static Callouts Clean, minimalist, high-contrast imagery with bold text overlays. Direct Offer

Targets feeling-based ICPs with a clear message.
Direct Offer Videos Straightforward talking-head videos announcing first-time specials, seasonal packages, or holiday deals. Urgency & Scarcity

Drives time-bound action.
Educational Carousels Swipable graphics teaching scalp health, stress relief, or haircare tips. Added last with a hard CTA to a lead form. Retargeting / Value

Captures warm audiences with value-first content.
Approved for Wave 1:0of 5
3Production Pipeline & Content Multiplier

The Reels Creator Framework

Her phone footage is fantastic. We provide specific creative briefs to fill structural gaps. We'll incentivize her with a lump-sum payment upfront to batch-produce a massive vault of ad assets, then transition back to a weekly rhythm.

The Julio High-Quality Shoots

Julio handles premium, high-production video assets specifically for website recaps and top-tier branding.

The SEO & Local Geo Multiplier

Every high-quality video shot by Julio is transcribed, optimized, and turned into localized blog articles to boost local Google rankings for each specific spa location.

Page 03 — Organic Leverage

The Organic Automation Engine

Turning existing organic reach into booked appointments — a native Boulevard path now, plus an optional ManyChat layer led by Caroline.

1ManyChat & Organic Social Scaling

Maximizing Organic Views via Automated Touchpoints Suggested · Caroline Leading

Sage HeadSpa already gets solid organic views. ManyChat is a recommended enhancement, not a guaranteed rollout — but it's a high-upside way to weaponize that traffic with frictionless conversation funnels. Caroline is already on board to take the lead here.

Comment-to-DM Triggers

Call-outs on organic Reels/posts like — "Comment 'SCALP' to get our free Scalp Health Workbook!"

The GHL Bridge

ManyChat auto-drops into their DMs, delivers the value hook, and funnels them into our GoHighLevel automated tracking pipeline.

More touchpoints. Zero extra manual work for the busy spa team — and Caroline owns the build.
2Boulevard Booking Integration

Frictionless Booking & Software Alignment

The Boulevard Pivot

The direct booking option has been officially activated inside Boulevard.

The Organic CTA

Embed this native booking link directly across all organic content pathways to shorten the path to purchase.

Testing Phase

Co-piloted by our team to run live tests and ensure the handoff from social media to the Boulevard scheduling ecosystem is flawless.

3Phased Rollout Plan

Implementation Priority — Crawl, Walk, Run

1
Priority 1 · Immediate
Stabilize Core Revenue Architecture

Launch Page 1 regional ad setup and Page 2 website / nurture video assets to stabilize the core revenue architecture.

2
Priority 2 · Optional / Secondary
Deploy the ManyChat Ecosystem

Once the foundation is stable, Caroline leads the optional ManyChat build to squeeze extra ROI out of organic efforts.
